title: Swimming pool
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:SwimmingPool-DT4.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A swimming pool]]
A '''swimming pool''' was an artificially enclosed body of [[Water/Legends|water]] intended for recreational or competitive [[swimming]].

The [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] had six swimming pools located on its [[Lido Deck]]. The pools were of various design to accommodate multiple passengers, including a competition-sized [[Ammonia/Legends|NH<sub>3</sub>]]/[[Mercury/Legends|Hg]] tank.<ref name="RPG">[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']]</ref>
